evidence_summary: Establish the discovery of a massive gold-bearing quartz vein in the Arizona hills to drive the plot forward through high stakes and immediate resource acquisition needs.
In 1865, Carter and Powell discover a massive gold-bearing quartz vein in the Arizona hills. They agree on a plan: Powell will head to civilization for machinery while Carter stays to guard the site.
Carter and Powell stand before a newly uncovered, shimmering gold-bearing quartz vein.
The men separate with a strategic plan to secure the claim.
Discovery of wealth leads to a tactical division of labor.
